task: Search for 3 bedroom condos with 2+ bathrooms within $1500- $2500 range in NYC.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the requested search on Apartments.com and reached the correctly filtered results page for NYC condos with 3+ beds, 2+ baths, and price $1,500–$2,500. Evidence shows the final URL was `https://www.apartments.com/condos/new-york-ny/min-3-bedrooms-2-bathrooms-1500-to-2500/`, and the page displayed filter chips/buttons for Price `$1.5k - $2.5k`, Beds `3+ Beds / 2+ Baths`, and Home Type `Condos`, with the heading `3 Bedroom New York NY Condos for Rent under $2,500 - 686 Rentals`. Although the visible listings were mostly room/shared-rental entries, the site itself presented those as the results for the applied condo search; per the judging rules, the explicit website result-state should be trusted. The agent also captured a screenshot of the results page. Therefore the task of searching for matching condos in NYC was successfully completed.
final_result_response:
Done. I searched Apartments.com with these filters:

- Location: New York, NY
- Home type: Condos
- Bedrooms: 3+ beds
- Bathrooms: 2+ baths
- Price: $1,500 to $2,500

Results page: https://www.apartments.com/condos/new-york-ny/min-3-bedrooms-2-bathrooms-1500-to-2500/

Apartments.com shows 686 rentals matching those filters. Most visible listings at this price point appear to be shared/room-for-rent arrangements, such as “Room in Shared 5 bed/2 bath home,” even though the condo and bedroom/bath filters are applied.

Screenshot saved here:

![NYC condo search results](./artifacts/nyc-condo-search-results.png)
action_history: Opening Apartments.com: const p_apts1 = await openTab('https://www.apartments.com/');
Searching for NYC condo criteria: await page.locator('e201').fill('3 bedroom condos with 2+ bathrooms between $1500 and $2500 in NYC');
Searching for NYC condo criteria: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Opening home type filter: await page.locator('e20').click();
Closing home type filter: await page.locator('e723').click();
Opening beds and baths filter: await page.locator('e19').click();
Confirming filters and top results: await page.locator('e735').click();
Opening specialty housing filter: await page.locator('e21').click();
Closing specialty filter: await page.locator('e750').click();
Opening specialty housing filter: await page.locator('e21').click();
Opening all filters: await page.locator('e750').click();
Opening all filters: await page.locator('e22').click();
Trying rooms-for-rent checkbox: await page.locator('label[for="adv-additional-options-128"]').click();
Opening cleaner Apartments.com URL: await openTab('https://www.apartments.com/condos/new-york-ny/min-3-bedrooms-2-bathrooms-1500-to-2500/');
Checking next results page: await page.locator('e566').click();
Trying sorted Apartments.com results: await openTab('https://www.apartments.com/condos/new-york-ny/min-3-bedrooms-2-bathrooms-1500-to-2500/?so=1');
Opening sort menu: await page.locator('e25').click();
Trying last updated sort: await page.locator('e715').click();
Scanning sorted result pages for non-room listings: await openTab('https://www.apartments.com/condos/new-york-ny/min-3-bedrooms-2-bathrooms-1500-to-2500/?so=1');
Scanning sorted result pages for non-room listings: await page.locator('a.next').click();

screenshots.title: Scanning sorted result pages for non-room listings
